column43:
Hello!
I am unfortunately reaching out to find out what the cancellation policy looks like for my current situation, where I am about half-way though my coaching sessions and at the beginning of the intermediate section of the course.
This is nothing really to do with the course material or the course itself as I have found it very useful in my journey to learn both Mandarin and Cantonese.

Currently, I have had some personal things come up in my life that I need to address and can no longer continue with the commitment to continue the course and need to step away for my own wellbeing. 
While I do think at some point I will try to continue this learning journey, I need to put it down for now.

I know it may be a little more complicated with my using the payment plan, but please let me know what this process looks like.

Even though am disappointed to have to drop, I am immensely grateful for what this program has helped me achieve thus far and appreciate the work that has gone into making this program.

Thank you so much,
Jason Chew

She first reached out last May, and just emailed us again recently. At that time, she only mentioned the ICGC, not the 1-year contract, so I had no idea about that part. As she reached out before, we were already planning to end the group coaching. However, she’s still asking for clarification about her contract, compensation, and the status of the live coaching sessions.

Based on our system, Caroline only had 6 months of access, but she’s claiming she purchased 1 year of access.
Should I go ahead and extend her access for 1 year based on her contract? Should we also add her back to the ICGC?
